name: The Untamed Wilds
intro_text: The year is 1921. You have joined Professor Harlan Earnshaw's archaeological expedition deep into the jungles of southern Mexico, searching for a fabled Eztli ruin said to contain an artifact of untold power.
The jungle is alive — and it does not welcome you. Strange tracks cross the trail. Something watches from the undergrowth. The expedition camp feels less safe by the hour.
You must push deeper into the rainforest and find the ruins before Ichtaca, the Eztli Huntress, drives you back — or something worse claims you first.
setup_instructions: Gather the Rainforest and Agents of Yig encounter sets. Set aside the Eztli encounter set for Scenario 2.
Place the Expedition Camp (start revealed). Shuffle the 7 rainforest locations face-down and reveal 3 at random. Place the Ruins of Eztli face-down in Act 2.
Each investigator begins at the Expedition Camp. Place 1 resource on each unrevealed location — these are the supplies they contain.
Ichtaca is placed at the Ruins of Eztli and will pursue investigators who linger.
The scenario ends when investigators reach the Ruins of Eztli and advance Act 3, or when the agenda advances past its final threshold.

resolutions.R1: You reach the Ruins of Eztli and secure a way inside. Harlan is overjoyed — whatever lies within could change history. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators found the entrance to the Eztli ruins.*
resolutions.R2: Ichtaca corners you at the camp and forces you to retreat. The ruins remain unseen. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were forced to retreat from the jungle.*
resolutions.defeat: The jungle claimed you. Your expedition ends here. Each investigator suffers 1 physical trauma.
